_meta.note: Cycle 12. Validated T038 drain scaling impact on player survivability. No headless runner (Godot native). Analysis via web-demo source files.

cautious_player.verdict: Cautious player still not at risk with pure heal strategy. Stage 3 is net +1.7/card which removes immortality only if min-heal options are chosen. This is intentional for a first iteration — adds visible HUD pressure even if not lethal. Recommend T040: reduce avg heal to +3.5 in cycle 13 to make stage2 net-negative.

aggressive_player.verdict: Aggressive player faces meaningful death risk after card 25. Stage 3 creates genuine late-run tension. T038 is correctly balanced for aggressive play style.

t038_drain_scaling_validation.effect_on_game_feel: Stage2 drain shown in HUD life bar — player sees it drop faster. Creates urgency without hard-gating. Correct direction.
t038_drain_scaling_validation.verdict: PASS — T038 adds meaningful pressure for aggressive players, visible HUD feedback for all players

t039_faction_balance_validation.synergy_note: Higher ankou cards (fate/mortality) pair with T038 scaling — player feeling drain + seeing death-related card options creates narrative coherence.
t039_faction_balance_validation.verdict: PASS — constraints correctly address cycle 11 imbalance

effect_caps_compliance.llm_cards: COMPLIANT — T036 sanitization in place since cycle 11

new_backlog_recommendations.title: Reduce avg heal in card pool from +4.7 to +3.5 for stage2 to be net-negative
